description: Vault for cross-repo linkages, obscure connections, and experimental nexus contracts binding regions, personas, and events.

POL002_NoRawNarrativeInTier.description: May contain explicit cross-repo narrative motifs; restrict access via governance.

POL003_RequireSchemaRef.description: All nexus and linkage artifacts must use their canonical schemas.

POL004_RequireTargetMetadata.description: Nexus contracts must explicitly reference source and target artifacts by ID, not embedded content.

POL006_RequireRoutingSpineRef.description: Any AI-generated nexusContractCard must be routed via the spine to this repo.

authoringHints.summary: Use this vault for contracts that represent obscure, cross-repo connections rather than primary content.
aiBehavior: Do not create primary moods, regions, seeds, or events here; only nexus and linkage structures.
Always reference artifacts in other repos via stable IDs and routing metadata.
Assume higher sensitivity than normal vaults; avoid using this repo for simple relationships.
